data.title: NEAR expected to reach $1.35-$1.50 target by mid-April 2026. Current price at $1.19 with resistance at $1.26. Upside potential of 13-26% in 4-6 weeks if momentum changes.
data.description: NEAR Protocol is currently trading at $1.19, displaying a blend of indicators with a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) and significant resistance noted at $1.26. Analysts conducting technical analysis predict a potential increase of 13-26%, leading the price to the range of $1.35-$1.50 within the next 4-6 weeks if there is a shift in momentum.

data.title: Atos introduces new Threat Research Center, focusing on cybersecurity threats and analysis.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the county dropped to 4.2%, marking a significant decrease from the previous 5.6%. This positive trend indicates that more people are finding employment opportunities within the region. Additionally, the report highlighted that the number of new job openings has increased by 10%, showing a promising outlook for the economy. Experts predict that this downward trend in unemployment and the rise in job opportunities will continue in the coming months, providing a brighter future for job seekers in the county.

data.title: Oculis Announces European Medicines Agency PRIME Designation for Privosegtor, Advancing a Potential First‑in‑Class Neuroprotective Candidate for Optic Neuritis
data.description: Oculis Holding AG (Nasdaq: OCS / XICE: OCS) based in Zug, Switzerland, a leading global biopharmaceutical company specializing in ophthalmology and neuro-ophthalmology, disclosed that their neuroprotective drug Privosegtor has received Priority Medicines (PRIME) status from the European Medicines Agency (EMA) for addressing optic neuritis (ON). Optic neuritis is a rare and serious condition that can lead to vision loss and is frequently linked to multiple sclerosis. This designation signifies the significance of Privosegtor in addressing this critical medical need.

data.title: Wolters Kluwer inaugurates new Pune office, marking the next chapter of its technology growth journey in India
data.description: Wolters Kluwer has opened a new office in Pune, advancing its technology expansion in India. This move signifies a significant milestone in the company's journey, highlighting its commitment to growth and development in the region. With this new office, Wolters Kluwer aims to further strengthen its presence in India and capitalize on the country's skilled workforce and technological capabilities. This strategic decision underscores the company's dedication to leveraging India's potential as a key player in the technology sector.

data.title: Efekta Education Group partners with ECC Co., Ltd. to revolutionise English language education in Japan
data.description: In a groundbreaking development, Efekta Education Group has revealed a significant collaboration with Japan's premier English conversation school catering to corporate learners. This partnership is set to introduce innovative English lessons rooted in engaging real-world contexts. The announcement was made in London on March 31, 2026. This collaboration offers a unique opportunity for both entities to leverage their expertise and resources to deliver top-quality education. Stay tuned for the cutting-edge English lessons arising from this collaboration between Efekta Education Group and the esteemed English conversation school, set to benefit a wide audience of corporate learners.

data.title: M&A Source® Announces the 2026 Spring Conference & Deal Market
data.description: Independence, Ohio, March 31, 2026 - M&A Source®, a prominent not-for-profit association for professionals involved in lower middle market business transactions, unveiled details for the 2026 Spring Conference & Deal Market. Scheduled for June 1 to 3 at the Hyatt, this event is expected to bring together a diverse group of individuals and firms to discuss current trends and opportunities in the industry. Participants can look forward to a series of workshops, networking sessions, and deal-making opportunities during the multi-day conference.

data.title: RDW: The Netherlands introduces truck toll on 1 July 2026
data.description: Starting July 1, 2026, Netherlands will implement a truck toll system where truck owners, including foreign vehicles, will be charged per kilometer traveled. This initiative mirrors similar toll systems already in place in various European nations. The introduction of truck tolls is a part of the efforts to regulate road usage and manage traffic flow effectively.

data.title: Gentronix Now Operating Under the Scantox Brand
data.description: Scantox Group is enhancing its discovery and development platform in EJBY, Denmark by providing integrated genetic toxicology and genomic safety services. This expansion, announced on March 31, 2026, includes Gentronix, a leading expert in genetic toxicology. This move will offer clients comprehensive services to address genetic safety concerns.

data.title: Stellar (XLM) aims for $0.20 by mid-2026, currently trading at $0.17 with RSI 51.27. Resistance at $0.18, support at $0.16.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Stellar (XLM) is currently trading at $0.17, displaying a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 51.27. Based on technical analysis, there is a projected potential increase to $0.20 by mid-2026. Key resistance levels are identified at $0.18, while the support level stands at $0.16.

data.title: Abu Dhabi's IFC announces 36% Surge in AUM, 51% Increase in Workforce and Over 12,000 Licences in 2025
data.description: In March 31, 2026, the Abu Dhabi Global Market (ADGM), serving as Abu Dhabi's International Financial Centre (IFC), experienced a successful year marked by significant growth and achieving strategic goals. This performance further solidified ADGM's position in elevating Abu Dhabi as a prominent global financial hub. The center successfully drew in a noteworthy amount of international capital, showcasing its appeal to global investors.

data.title: Nebius to Construct 310 MW AI Factory in Finland
data.description: An AI cloud company, Nebius, unveiled plans to build a new AI factory in Lappeenranta, Finland, with a massive capacity of 310 MW. The first output is set to launch in 2027, making it one of the biggest AI factories in Europe. This move comes after Nebius expanded its initial Finnish data center in Mäntsälä to 75 MW.

data.title: Green Technology Market to Reach USD 102.26 Bn by 2031 Driven by Renewable Energy Adoption and Smart Infrastructure, Reports Mordor Intelligence
data.description: In Hyderabad, India, as of March 31, 2026, a recent study by Mordor Intelligence reveals significant growth in the green technology sector. The report highlights a surge in this market driven by a collective effort from governments and businesses to embrace sustainability and low-carbon solutions. The research indicates a substantial increase in demand for green technology products and services, showcasing a shift towards eco-friendly practices among various sectors. This trend underscores the growing importance of environmental consciousness, with investments in green technology witnessing a surge in recent times.

data.title: MOVA Launches Smart Ring H1 and Smart Glasses S1, Defining a New Wearable AI Ecosystem
data.description: In San Jose, California on March 31, 2026, leading premium brand MOVA revealed its latest wearable technology at a worldwide debut. The company showcased the MOVA Smart Ring H1 and Smart Glasses S1 as part of its growing smart device lineup. This expansion signals a significant move by MOVA into multi-category smart devices, highlighting their commitment to innovation and technological advancement.
